prompt: Create a vertical cinematic night street photograph in rainy urban Japan, showing a faceless young man in a white suit standing and walking slowly outside a brightly lit FamilyMart convenience store. He holds a transparent umbrella in one hand, with his other hand in his trouser pocket, wearing a white blazer, white slacks, white shirt, pale tie, and dark shoes; his face is intentionally blurred or obscured for anonymity. The scene is shot from sidewalk level with a slight wide-angle perspective, wet black pavement filling the foreground and reflecting neon signs, store lights, and street lamps. The storefront occupies the right side with glass doors, posters, trash bins, vending or ATM-like machines, and a green entrance mat; the large facade sign reads “FamilyMart.” On the upper left, include one hanging illuminated sign made of exactly 3 stacked panels labeled “FamilyMart,” “酒 たばこ,” and “銀行ATM.” Add a receding row of blurry illuminated shop signs and streetlights down the left side for depth. Use a moody neo-noir atmosphere, heavy rain, visible raindrops on the umbrella, glossy reflections, soft haze, analog film grain, slight chromatic aberration, muted teal-green and warm fluorescent tones, shallow depth of field, realistic photography, 35mm film look, subtle motion blur, high contrast, vertical 9:16 composition.
